title: Implement SQLite migration seed script
description: Implement MAP_System/migration/seed_from_files.py to populate SQLite from the current file-backed state (Phase 1 of the SQLite migration design in artifacts/planning/sqlite-task-board.md). Script must be idempotent, create map.db with the full schema, and seed agents, tasks, dependencies, events, and decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Creates MAP_System/map.db with all tables from the design document
Seeds tasks, dependencies, agents, events, and decisions from current files
Idempotent: re-running does not duplicate rows
Prints a summary of rows inserted or skipped
